personal.preferred_title: Data Engineer | AWS, Lakehouse, Python, SQL & AI-Ready Data Platforms

summary: Senior Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise IT experience building scalable data pipelines, AWS data platform patterns, data warehouses, data lakes, analytics datasets, and AI/ML-ready workflows. Strong hands-on background in Python, SQL, Pandas, PySpark, Spark, AWS S3, Glue, Redshift, Athena-style querying, ETL/ELT, data quality, governance-aware delivery, documentation, and production troubleshooting. Experienced supporting internal and client-facing technical work, translating business requirements into practical engineering solutions, and building reusable data assets for analytics, forecasting, AI workflows, and operational decision-making.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Designed and built automated Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ enterprise endpoints, replacing manual extraction and reporting workflows with repeatable data flows.
Built AWS-oriented data platform patterns using S3 landing zones, Glue-based ETL, Athena-style lake access, Redshift analytics, partition-aware storage, and curated reporting datasets.
Developed scalable processing workflows using Python, SQL, Pandas, PySpark, Spark, Oracle, Redshift, AWS S3, and Glue to support analytics, forecasting, and operational reporting.
Prepared validated, ML-ready datasets and forecasting workflows using Prophet and scikit-learn to predict capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead.
Created data quality checks, reconciliation routines, validation logic, and anomaly-style troubleshooting procedures to improve accuracy, consistency, and reliability of production datasets.
Optimized SQL queries, storage structures, partition-oriented access patterns, and data preparation workflows to improve cost, speed, and reporting performance.
Built dashboard-ready datasets and visualization workflows using Streamlit, matplotlib, seaborn, plotly, Oracle, Redshift, and enterprise telemetry data.
Documented data models, pipeline architecture, transformation logic, validation rules, operational runbooks, and best practices for maintainability and knowledge sharing.

Used AI-assisted development, RAG-style retrieval, vector embeddings, and agentic workflow patterns to accelerate structured artifact generation, documentation, code review, and repeatable data engineering work.
Partnered with technical stakeholders, operations teams, and leadership to translate ambiguous business needs into data requirements, pipeline deliverables, and decision-support outputs.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Served as senior client-facing technical advisor for a large financial-services monitoring and reporting environment with 50+ Enterprise Managers and 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents.
Built Perl and Korn Shell extraction scripts to automate recurring performance reporting and reduce manual operational effort.
Designed dashboards, SLA thresholds, alerting logic, and reporting standards adopted by client teams for application performance visibility.
Created technical documentation, onboarding material, repeatable support procedures, and stakeholder-facing reporting workflows.
Collaborated with application, infrastructure, and WebLogic performance teams to analyze telemetry, identify bottlenecks, and support production remediation.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Led the FAST project, data-mining Gomez Synthetic Monitoring metrics to identify optimization opportunities for revenue-generating web systems.
Built analytics and operational reporting workflows that converted raw performance measurements into actionable recommendations for engineering and business stakeholders.
Managed Dynatrace AppMon and Synthetic Monitoring for Brand.com and critical systems, supporting dashboards, transaction tracing, production troubleshooting, and reporting continuity.
Supported AWS cloud migration planning by evaluating monitoring readiness, visibility gaps, operational support needs, and production data access patterns.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led migration of a high-throughput transaction engine from 200+ MySQL nodes to a 6-node Oracle RAC cluster supporting mission-critical transaction volume.
Designed validation tooling in C++/OCCI/OCI to verify migration correctness across large transaction datasets and protect data integrity during phased cutover.
Automated schema conversion, data validation, migration-readiness checks, and cutover-support workflows for high-volume relational systems.
Optimized Oracle transaction processing and query access patterns, reducing physical hardware footprint by 95% while maintaining sub-second query latency.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Analyzed J2EE telecom applications under load to identify database bottlenecks, throughput limits, thread pressure, heap behavior, CPU constraints, and garbage collection impact.
Configured JMX Monitoring, Wily Introscope, and thread dump automation to improve observability during performance testing.
Documented performance baselines, regression thresholds, and release-risk findings used by engineering teams for production readiness decisions.

experience.title: Architect/Developer (IRS CADE Project)
bullets: Designed UML class and sequence diagrams and developed modules for the IRS CADE modernization project.
Built CICS, MQ Series, XML, VC++, and DB2 integration components in a structured government modernization environment.
Created technical documentation and supported disciplined delivery practices for a regulated modernization program.

experience.title: Developer / Support Engineer (Billing, Interfaces, CSM/PRMS)
bullets: Developed and supported billing, EDI, invoicing, settlement, and reporting modules across full telecom billing lifecycle workflows.
Built Oracle, PL/SQL, Pro*C, SQL, and C/C++ processing components for high-volume structured billing and reporting data workflows.
Improved C/C++/Pro*C/PL/SQL billing process performance, reducing memory usage 75%, improving throughput 20%, and achieving 10x database performance via sequence optimization.
Automated WebLogic/WebSphere administration tasks using Korn Shell scripting to reduce manual deployment and support effort.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.AWS Data Platforms: AWS S3, AWS Glue, Amazon Athena, Amazon Redshift, AWS EC2, AWS ECS, Data Lake Patterns, Serverless Query Patterns, Cloud Data Architecture
skills.Data Engineering: ETL/ELT Pipelines, Data Warehouses, Data Lakes, Lakehouse Architecture, Data Ingestion, Data Transformation, Data Modeling, Data Quality, Data Governance
skills.Programming & Querying: Python, SQL, Pandas, PySpark, Apache Spark, PL/SQL, Oracle SQL, Perl, Korn Shell Scripting, C++, Java
skills.AI/ML Data Enablement: ML-Ready Datasets, Feature Engineering Pipelines, Model Monitoring Concepts, Retraining Pipeline Concepts, Data Drift Detection Concepts, Prophet, scikit-learn
skills.LLM & AI Workflows: LLM-Based Tools, AI APIs, RAG / Vector Embeddings, Vector Database Concepts, Agentic Workflows, Claude Code, Grok API, Structured Artifact Generation
skills.Orchestration & Transformation: Apache Airflow, Prefect Concepts, dbt Concepts, Workflow Automation, Scheduling, Dependency Management, Transformation Tooling
skills.IaC & DevOps: Terraform Fundamentals, Git, Docker, CI/CD Pipeline Design, Code Review, Engineering Standards, Agile Collaboration, Technical Documentation
skills.Performance & Reliability: Query Optimization, Storage Optimization, Partitioning Concepts, Cost-Aware Processing, Pipeline Monitoring, Production Troubleshooting, Root Cause Analysis
skills.Governance & Lineage: Data Lineage Concepts, Metadata Concepts, Data Quality Frameworks, Validation Checks, Reconciliation, Compliance-Aware Delivery, Secure Deployment Awareness
skills.Consulting & Delivery: Client-Facing Technical Contribution, Requirements Translation, PMO Collaboration, Risk Escalation, SOW-Aligned Delivery, Knowledge Sharing, Mentoring

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a serverless AWS data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Bedrock, and PySpark. Built optimized ETL patterns, partition-aware Parquet storage layouts, and analytics access patterns for enterprise-scale reporting and AI-enabled access.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built a Python and PySpark forecasting platform that transformed enterprise telemetry into validated ML-ready datasets, reduced manual forecasting cycles by 90%, and produced bottleneck predictions 6 months ahead.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an end-to-end agentic workflow using Python, Claude Code, Grok API, FAISS, and sentence-transformers for semantic matching, scoring, structured JSON/YAML artifact generation, quality gates, and reusable automation.
